gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just did its daily rounds, updating metrics and health checks for all community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status.
gist.impact: Ensures the app showcase and README reflect the latest community usage statistics and health statuses.
gist.visual_concept: A robot and a bee doing daily chores in a greenhouse. The robot represents the automated bot, checking metrics on a clipboard, while the bee waters the community 'app' plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants in a greenhouse. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny watering can. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants in a greenhouse. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny watering can. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites.
